Dear Mr. Epstein,

Alan asked me to send you this draft, which
incorporates both previous
drafts, not for your approval, but for any
suggestions you might
have. After you have looked it over and made
suggestions, Alan will
circulate it to the rest of the team for their
suggestions.

Sincerely,

Mitch

subject: Re: draft - letter to friends
body:
I would amend the place where it says he wishes I had
cameras in the massage room... IT would be illegal...
ANd I think we could do better thatn the last
paragraph ,, JEffrey is a "good person".. great
friend. , loyal, funny, generous,   not GOOD
